source.notes: County-level context prepared for Lancaster Orion parcel samples. Historical ratio context is compiled in the assessment-ratio file; 2026 market grouping and assessor-process notes come from the 2026 R&O.

residential.qualityOfAssessment: Meets generally accepted mass appraisal techniques.

commercial.qualityOfAssessment: Meets generally accepted mass appraisal techniques.

agricultural.qualityOfAssessment: Meets generally accepted mass appraisal techniques.

schoolBondAgriculturalLand.qualityOfAssessment: Meets generally accepted mass appraisal techniques.

residential: Residential valuation groups 1-17 are Lincoln neighborhoods; groups 18-22 are rural residential groups; groups 23-24 are small-village groups.
The Lancaster County Assessor is in compliance with the six-year inspection and review cycle.
The 2026 R&O reports 8,360 qualified residential sales with a countywide median ratio of 97.00 and COD of 4.97.
commercial: Commercial valuation groups 42-46 are based on occupancy codes.
The 2026 R&O reports 358 qualified commercial sales with a countywide median ratio of 97.40 and COD of 9.44.
agricultural: All Lancaster agricultural land is subject to non-agricultural influence.
The agricultural statistical sample uses comparable, uninfluenced areas outside Lancaster County.
The 2026 R&O reports special valuation level of value at 72% and school bond agricultural land value at 50%.
